title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI & Python/JS bindings for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, CodeLlama and 40+ GGUF models locally with GPU/Metal acceleration.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript client for the Ollama server; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: ollama/ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings; install via pip install ollama.

title: jmorganca/ollama
summary: PyPI landing page for ollama-python; same official client distributed via pip.

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integration)
summary: First-class LangChain LLM & chat component that wraps the Ollama REST API for RAG, agents, chains.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; features folders, sharing, code highlighting, multi-user auth.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui-lite
summary: Lightweight SvelteKit distribution of the Ollama WebUI packaged as an npm module for quick embedding.

title: richawo/ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI (TUI) chat client for Ollama written in Node; supports markdown, conversation history, themes.

title: continuedev/continue (Ollama coder)
summary: VS-Code/JetBrains plugin that adds local code-completion via Ollama (CodeLlama, DeepSeek-Coder).

title: ollama-rag/ollama-rag-langchain
summary: Starter repo for building RAG pipelines using Ollama embeddings + LangChain Chroma vector store.

title: r/ollama - Reddit community
summary: Active subreddit (25 k) for sharing model files, troubleshooting, benchmarks and feature requests.

title: HackerNews: Show HN - Ollama
summary: Launch thread with maintainer comments on roadmap: OpenAI-compatible endpoint, function-calling, multi-modal.

title: mckaywrigley/ollama-code-gpt
summary: Next.js chat UI fine-tuned for coding questions, connects to local Ollama instance, supports GPT-4 fallback.

title: kevinwatt/ollama-tools
summary: Collection of shell scripts: bulk model downloader, Modelfile generator, GPU memory monitor for Ollama.

title: ollama/ollama-main (npm)
summary: Official npm package for ollama-js; same repo as GitHub, auto-published on release.
